overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a player navigating dark, neon-lit back alleys and commercial streets of a futuristic city at night. The player crouches through a narrow graffiti-covered passage before walking through bustling pedestrian areas and briefly entering a prefabricated building.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with vertical neon signage

events.description: player character crouches down low to the ground while continuing to move forward

agents.ego_description: crouching low and moving slowly through the narrow wet alleyway, passing trash bags and graffiti walls

notable_agents.action: person standing against the right wall observing the alley

entered.detail: tall vertical neon sign with glowing red Japanese characters
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art
piles of black garbage bags and scattered debris along the wall
blue illuminated signage on a distant building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a narrow, wet alleyway illuminated by a prominent vertical red neon sign with Japanese characters. The player crouches down while moving forward, passing graffiti-covered walls and piles of trash bags. The atmosphere is dark and cyberpunk, with steam rising from vents on the ground.

events.description: player stands up from crouching position and resumes normal walking speed

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the alley passing various pedestrians and examining the graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward the player through the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The player stands up and continues walking through a narrow alley densely covered in graffiti on both sides. Several pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, creating a moderate crowd density in the confined space. The vertical neon sign disappears behind as the alley continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with hotel entrance

events.description: pink neon hotel sign becomes visible, casting magenta light on the surroundings

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered walkway area, passing under overhead structures and alongside parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt walking ahead in the same direction as the player

entered.detail: large bright pink neon sign spelling HOTEL mounted on the wall
overhead metal roofing structure covering the walkway
abandoned or parked vehicle with covered tarp on the left side

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a covered walkway dominated by a bright pink neon HOTEL sign on the left wall. The player walks under an overhead metal structure, passing a parked vehicle and following a pedestrian in a white shirt. The lighting shifts to a magenta hue from the hotel signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with neon storefronts

events.description: exits covered walkway into open street with multiple colorful neon signs and billboards
approaches and enters the PREFAB CITY building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the open street passing various storefronts, vending machines, and neon advertisements

entered.detail: orange neon sign reading PREFAB CITY above a doorway entrance
row of illuminated vending machines with glowing displays
tall buildings covered in bright neon advertising displays

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the player enters an open commercial street lined with bright neon billboards and vending machines. The player walks toward a building entrance marked by an orange PREFAB CITY neon sign, passing scattered pedestrians and illuminated storefronts along the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: small storage room with metal shelving

events.description: enters the PREFAB CITY building from the street into an interior space
exits the building back onto the neon-lit street

agents.ego_description: entering the small storage room, observing the interior with shelves and a seated person, then exiting back to the street

notable_agents.action: man sitting in a chair against the wall inside the room

entered.detail: tall metal shelving units filled with boxes and containers
bright overhead fluorescent tube lighting illuminating the room
colorful posters on the wall behind the seated man
neon sign reading THE LOVE visible after exiting back to street

segments.scene_description: The player enters the PREFAB CITY building into a small storage room with metal shelves and fluorescent lighting, where a man sits in a chair against the wall. After a brief moment inside, the player exits back onto the street, passing a vending machine and a neon sign reading THE LOVE as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, dark alleyway into the vibrant, neon-saturated commercial streets of a futuristic city. It begins with a crouched movement through a wet, steam-filled alley illuminated by a red vertical neon sign and flanked by graffiti-covered walls. As the player stands and moves forward, the confined space opens into a covered walkway where the lighting shifts to a magenta hue under a bright pink hotel sign. The scene then expands into an open commercial street filled with glowing billboards and vending machines before the camera briefly enters a fluorescent-lit storage room inside the Prefab City building. Finally, the camera exits the building and glides back onto the wet asphalt, passing a vending machine and a neon sign for The Love.
